name: bunq Partner MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant drive the bunq Partner API — onboarding, KYC, accounts, payments, cards, and compliance.

name: Mollie MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant manage Mollie payments, customers, invoices, subscriptions, balances, settlements, terminals, and webhooks.

name: Moneybird MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant manage Moneybird bookkeeping — invoices, contacts, and accounting data.

name: Simplicate MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant work with Simplicate's project, CRM, and invoicing data via a per-domain hosted endpoint.

name: Nmbrs AI Connector
description_en: Lets an AI assistant perform Dutch payroll actions in Nmbrs, with confirmation-gated writes.

name: Praat met je Boekhouding
description_en: Lets an AI assistant work with Exact Online bookkeeping across 86 tools — invoicing, BTW/ICP, and reporting, read-only by default.

name: e-Boekhouden MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant read and write e-Boekhouden administration using your own API credentials.

name: Twinfield MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant query and update Twinfield bookkeeping over its SOAP API.

name: Yuki MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant drive Yuki accounting across 102 operations, with write actions gated.

name: WeFact MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant manage WeFact debtors, invoices, products, and subscriptions.
